name: bonobo_chr7_centromere
description: Pan paniscus chr7 centromere / pericentromere. Alpha-satellite higher-order repeat (HOR) array; 11-monomer HOR unit (~1881 bp). T2T-resolved alpha-sat array; flanked by ape-lineage PpanSAT satellite blocks. Centromere mapping is HOR-aware; LLmap should refuse to silently collapse cross-species divergence here.
expected_copy_count: thousands of 171 bp alpha-satellite monomers in 11-mer HOR units, tandemly arrayed over 3.8 Mb
